title: APT Design Architecture Reference

criticalGate.mergeBlockRule: Unresolved critical architecture failures block merge unless a linked exception exists in docs/DECISION_LOG.md.

must: Keep shared reusable contracts in packages/*
never: Do not run backend execution logic in web routes/components
Do not render frontend concerns in worker handlers

must: Use route -> service -> worker -> integration flow
Validate at worker boundaries before side effects
never: Do not bypass service adapters for data-driven route logic

must: Deploy Worker before Pages when runtime config changes
never: Do not maintain conflicting deploy authorities for one surface

must: Keep internal AI operational authority in .github/copilot-instructions.md
never: Do not publish internal-only operational instructions in external bundles

must: Architecture docs must match repo/deploy reality
never: Do not leave doctrine drift unresolved after architecture changes

fastFailRules: Mixed frontend/backend ownership in same layer
Service layer bypass in data-driven route work
Broken internal vs external AI instructions split
